items.title: 0.1.0 — the founding
items.note: Contract, runtime, gate, ratchet, scaffolds, Pit Board, AGENTS.md-first docs. Steerability lab #1 passed with zero JS.

items.title: 0.2.0 — the constellation
items.note: Satellites (capture, manifests, mass), curvature pour, Auth skeleton with the revolving-door store, C-203 construction-grade.

items.title: Chart + atlas — the third render head
items.note: Agents read coordinates, not pixels. The atlas is a screen whose chart is the atlas. ANOM-170: purposes are law.

items.title: Concierge v1 — drafts, never deeds
items.note: The resident agent: intent becomes prefilled real forms the human fires. Zero mutating routes in its orbit, pinned by test.

items.title: The website-manifold
items.note: Recast by the owner: the board came home to the demo as the timing tower; the public site becomes its own repo — the stranger test.

items.title: Model-backed Resolver for the Concierge
items.note: Owner's inference doctrine (2026-07-12): the ModelResolver takes a completion CALLABLE — keys never touch framework code; house-paid behind CurrentUser (open inference GETs are a cost-DoS faucet), keyword floor always free, BYOK possible but discouraged (secrets custody), BYOA is the pressure valve — harness chat off-app, sidecar chat on-app, both live today via chart + tokens + real forms; the in-DOM ask box is Concierge territory by law: the DOM belongs to the house, the harness to the user, the browser is where they meet. Curvature never meters, never phones home, never sits in the billing path.

items.title: Personal access tokens for visiting agents
items.note: Minted via a form, shown exactly once, stored hashed, presented as Bearer; revocable. Bearer writes skip C-203 by design — no cookie, no CSRF shape.

items.title: Auth: direct OIDC + TOTP
items.note: Social login is one standard, zero middlemen. SAML stays outside forever, brokered at the edge.

items.title: Live — server-pushed fragment swaps
items.note: data-live opens the stream; the server pushes fragments; the boost layer swaps by id, skipping missing targets. Proven: curl POSTs, an open browser updates itself, zero reloads.

items.title: Event horizon doctrine (C-7xx)
items.note: The declared boundary where the gate's sight deliberately ends: budgeted, fenced, vendored 60fps enclaves.

items.title: Mongo store satellite
items.note: A real server on purpose, first-class, never default.

items.title: ANOM-150/151/160/161
items.note: Orphan CSS, registry patterns, third-party satellite audits, undeclared orbit contributions.

items.title: Deployment doc
items.note: docs/DEPLOY.md, written from curvature-site's actual Procfile: one process, four files, two honest proxy notes. No k8s ritual materialized.

items.title: Honest benchmarks
items.note: Render cost, cache behavior, requests-per-core against an equivalent SPA + JSON API. Published whatever they say.

items.title: Offline: a cache, never a database
items.note: A pure-replay worker for reads; offline writes refused loudly and promised in the manifesto. The promise is worth more than the feature.

items.title: curvature new demo
items.note: Pit Board as a scaffold: only a pour delivers code.

items.title: The design idea (owner's, sealed)
items.note: Requires semantic HTML, which the substrate already speaks. Tailwind remains heresy. Details live in the owner's head.

items.title: Timing tower — the board wears its true clothes
items.note: ON TRACK, SHIPPED with positions, STINT PLAN; paddle forms (OUT/FLAG/PIT); Nano Banana 2 emblem. Poured awake, with an idea in it.

items.title: curvature-site: the stranger test
items.note: DEPLOYED: live on Heroku via GitHub auto-deploy gated on CI. Poured by the published CLI, fed from PyPI, built only from commits the public gate blessed. The stranger test, complete at every layer.

items.title: The gate goes public — CI on both repos
items.note: Same ./gate.sh, witnessed on GitHub. Its first run caught a real bug: CI runners have no git identity, so pour commits now carry the scaffold's own. The badge means what it says.

items.title: v0.2.1 — the bump becomes law (C-403)
items.note: First publish under the standing blessing. ANOM-143 makes stale versions a gate matter; its arrival broke the 300-line ceiling on the gate's own modules — the first ANOM-140 in history forced the bounds-family split while it was cheap.
